plugins.description: Learn anything in tech with a wise, patient guide. Personalized learning plans, hands-on exercises, spaced repetition, Feynman technique, Bloom's taxonomy assessment. 11 skills, 3 agents, 3 knowledge bases, 1 path-scoped rule.
